root.name: Create hyperlinks from each experiment name in slide 3 to corresponding Wikipedia pages
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly created hyperlinks from each experiment name in slide 3 to the appropriate Wikipedia pages about the experiment or its researcher(s).

children.name: All experiment names in slide 3 are hyperlinked
children.description: Checks if every experiment name text element in slide 3 has a hyperlink.

children.name: Hyperlink destinations are correct Wikipedia pages
children.description: Checks that the hyperlinks point to Wikipedia pages for the experiment or the researcher(s) as appropriate.

children.name: No extraneous hyperlinks on slide 3
children.description: Ensures that there are no hyperlinks on slide 3 except on experiment names.

metadata.task: Create hyperlinks from each experiment name in slide 3 to corresponding Wikipedia pages about either the experiment or the researcher(s)
